notes: Config-as-data ConnectorSpec + SourceRegistryEntry manifests qualifying the DKR placeholder connectors across the SOURCE_CATALOG families. Connectors NORMALIZE only; tier/plane/visibility come from the source manifest, never connector code. Runtime: core/kernel/connector_runtime.ts.
